svg.metadata: {"_description":"Microservice mesh: API gateway routing to 5 specialized services, each with its own datastore.","type":"flow","title":"microservices","nodes":[{"id":"client","label":"Client","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"gw","label":"API Gateway","kind":"rectangle","accent":"accent"},{"id":"auth","label":"Auth Service","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"user","label":"User Service","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"order","label":"Order Service","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"pay","label":"Payment Service","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"notify","label":"Notification\nService","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"udb","label":"Users DB","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"odb","label":"Orders DB","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"queue","label":"Message Queue","kind":"note","background":"highlight"}],"edges":[{"from":"client","to":"gw","label":"request"},{"from":"gw","to":"auth","label":"verify"},{"from":"gw","to":"user"},{"from":"gw","to":"order"},{"from":"user","to":"udb"},{"from":"order","to":"odb"},{"from":"order","to":"pay","label":"charge"},{"from":"order","to":"queue","label":"publish","kind":"dashed"},{"from":"queue","to":"notify","label":"consume","kind":"dashed"}]}
